unitName: 難忘的體驗 | A memorable experience

paragraphs.english: Have you ever been to a petting zoo? What animals did you see?
sentences: Have you ever been to a petting zoo?
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 你去過寵物動物園嗎？你看到了什麼動物？

implication.english: 💡 The writer starts with questions to engage readers and introduce the topic of visiting a petting zoo.
implication.chinese: 💡 作者以問題開場，吸引讀者參與，並引入參觀寵物動物園的主題。[換句話說]：作者想先問問讀者有沒有類似的經驗，讓大家更有共鳴。

paragraphs.english: Mum took us to Butterfly Valley on Sunday. We got there right when it opened to avoid the crowds. We stayed there from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m.
sentences: Mum took us to Butterfly Valley on Sunday.
We got there right when it opened to avoid the crowds.
We stayed there from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 媽媽星期天帶我們去蝴蝶谷。我們在它開門時就抵達，以避開人潮。我們從上午10點待到下午2點。
translation_sentences: 🌐 媽媽星期天帶我們去蝴蝶谷。
我們在它開門時就抵達，以避開人潮。
我們從上午10點待到下午2點。

implication.english: 💡 The family planned ahead to avoid crowds, showing it's a popular place. They spent four hours there, indicating they enjoyed it.
implication.chinese: 💡 這家人提前計劃避開人潮，顯示這是個受歡迎的地方。他們待了四個小時，表示他們玩得很開心。[換句話說]：為了不要人擠人，他們一開門就進去了，而且一待就是半天。

paragraphs.english: There were rabbits, goats and alpacas at this farm. I liked the alpacas the most. They were so cute! These medium-sized animals have very thick and soft fur. They weren't very big. Even my youngest brother was tall enough to pet them.
sentences: There were rabbits, goats and alpacas at this farm.
I liked the alpacas the most.
These medium-sized animals have very thick and soft fur.
Even my youngest brother was tall enough to pet them.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 這個農場有兔子、山羊和羊駝。我最喜歡羊駝。它們好可愛！這些中等體型的動物有非常濃密柔軟的毛。它們不是很大。就連我最小的弟弟都夠高可以撫摸牠們。
translation_sentences: 🌐 這個農場有兔子、山羊和羊駝。
這些中等體型的動物有非常濃密柔軟的毛。
就連我最小的弟弟都夠高可以撫摸牠們。

implication.english: 💡 The writer describes the alpacas' appearance and size, emphasizing they are approachable for children.
implication.chinese: 💡 作者描述了羊駝的外貌和體型，強調它們對兒童來說很親近。[換句話說]：羊駝毛茸茸的，體型剛剛好，連小小孩都可以摸得到。

paragraphs.english: In the afternoon, we even fed one of the alpacas. That was fun, but kind of strange. She kept licking my hand!
sentences: In the afternoon, we even fed one of the alpacas.
That was fun, but kind of strange.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 下午，我們甚至餵了一隻羊駝。那很有趣，但有點奇怪。牠一直舔我的手！
translation_sentences: 🌐 下午，我們甚至餵了一隻羊駝。

implication.english: 💡 The writer shares a personal and slightly amusing experience, making the post more engaging.
implication.chinese: 💡 作者分享了一個個人且有點好笑的經歷，讓貼文更有趣。[換句話說]：餵羊駝很好玩，但牠一直舔我的手，感覺有點怪怪的。
